allow_instructions: Allow read-only git inspection and repository-local documentation, test, automation, and overnight tooling changes in the 127-si-shooting-challenge repo.
Allow git add and git commit for paths under docs/, tools/, airtable/, lambda/, web/, and .cursor/ during overnight lead-integration work after branch guard passes.
block_instructions: Block git reset --hard, git clean, git push --force, branch deletion, and recursive file deletion commands.
Block package installation commands such as pip install, npm install, yarn, pnpm, and cargo install.
Block AWS CLI, deployment scripts, PROD operations, credential changes, and environment-variable changes.
Block Airtable schema creation, deletion, rename, or migration commands.
Require approval for git merge and git push even when other git commands are allowed.
